ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the resource */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the resource is available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the technology */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_technologies" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology used in the resource */,
  "adopted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technology was adopted for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_type_links" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type associated with the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource type link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_courses" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course using the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was added to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_licenses" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license associated with the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license was added to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_permissions" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission associated with the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_resource_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed by the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "resource_id")
)
column_names: License under which the resource is available
Timestamp when the resource was created
Timestamp when the resource was last updated
ID of the technology used in the resource
Timestamp when the technology was adopted for the resource
ID of the resource associated with the tag
Timestamp when the tag was created

ID of the type associated with the resource
Timestamp when the resource type link was created

Timestamp of the user's last login

Timestamp when the resource was added to the course

Timestamp when the permission was added to the resource
